nodes.label: AI as contract analysis and comprehension aid
nodes.grounding_span: use AI to scan and pick out key points from the contracts

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and report writing
nodes.grounding_span: AI for brainstorming on reports, about the best way to present facts and figures

nodes.label: AI as Excel formula assistant
nodes.label_negative: Manual search and trial-and-error for technical solutions
nodes.grounding_span: using AI as a shortcut for formulae, VLookups etc in excel

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: One-shot complete task description to AI
nodes.grounding_span: Step by step. If it was a real person I was dealing with, I imagine they'd get frustrated

nodes.label: AI as personal relationship maintainer
nodes.label_negative: Impersonal or disrespectful treatment of AI
nodes.grounding_span: I treat people with respect, and I think that is how you should deal with an AI

nodes.label: AI as supportive teammate without judgment
nodes.label_negative: AI as critical or demanding collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: it was like having a teammate that didn't mind your poor explanations or briefs

nodes.label: AI as omniscient companion across systems
nodes.grounding_span: AI to almost be like a passenger along the 'journeys' I go through each day

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI will be a great time saver and automation is a crucial step in efficiencies

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I felt proud with the quality of the report I produced: visually it was professional and the content was like I'd been doing contract management for years

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: you are being true to yourself, kind of like the public versus private persona needs to remain consistent

nodes.label: Learning and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I do like to learn and understand

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I felt proud with the quality of the report I produced

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI's non-judgmental listening
nodes.grounding_span: it was like having a teammate that didn't mind your poor explanations or briefs

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I hope so. I think multi-platform integration and standardisation is going to be a next step

nodes.label: Abstract-to-concrete iterative thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I like to develop my thoughts and build and build upon ideas

nodes.label: Visual-contextual thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I'm a visual person, and with reports, and in particular, tables and spreadsheets in excel, I like things to look a certain way
